overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a dark coat walking through a rainy, nocturnal coastal landscape. The character traverses rocky shores and grassy terrain, encounters a large quadrupedal creature, and approaches a distant campfire. The scene features atmospheric blue lighting and heavy rainfall throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal path transitioning to grassland

events.description: terrain transitions from rocky shoreline to tall grass meadow

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the coastal path through rain, moving from rocky terrain into grassy areas

entered.detail: steep rock face forming the right boundary of the path
dark water visible to the left of the path
tall waterfall cascading down the distant mountain wall
tall grass patches appearing along the path
small orange light visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rocky coastal path in heavy rain, with ocean water visible to the left and a steep cliff wall to the right. Around the 18-second mark, the terrain transitions from rocky shore to tall grass meadow, with a distant waterfall and campfire light visible ahead.

events.description: large quadrupedal creature emerges from the left and walks past the character

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward as a large creature passes by on the left

notable_agents.action: large dark quadrupedal creature walking from left to right behind the character

entered.detail: massive dark creature with glowing elements walking through the grass

segments.scene_description: The character moves through taller grass as a massive dark creature emerges from the left and walks past, heading toward the right. The creature appears to be a large quadruped with a bulky silhouette, moving slowly through the rain-soaked grassland.

events.description: creature moves out of frame, revealing open approach to distant campfire

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distant campfire light, moving through open rocky terrain

entered.detail: ancient stone structures or ruins becoming visible on the left

segments.scene_description: With the creature gone, the character continues across open rocky ground toward the campfire, which grows larger and more defined. Stone ruins become visible on the left side as the character approaches the destination, with the waterfall now visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rainy coastline that transitions from a narrow rocky path into an open grassland leading toward a distant campfire. It begins with the character walking between the churning ocean and a steep cliff wall under heavy rain. As the terrain shifts from the rocky shore to a tall grass meadow, a massive, bulky quadrupedal creature emerges from the left and slowly crosses the character's path. The scene then opens up across rocky ground as the creature departs, bringing the warm glow of the campfire into sharper focus. Finally, the camera moves past stone ruins on the left and a waterfall on the right as the character approaches the flickering light of the destination.
